global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel booking service with a focus on convenience.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: NomadLaye logo
elements.description: Bold, large text displaying 'NomadLaye' in a prominent position at the top.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: Text that reads 'Escape this weekend' in a clear, readable font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Hotels + flights in one tap
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message, stating 'Hotels + flights in one tap' in a simple font.

elements.label: Try for free button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Circular decorative shapes
elements.description: Several circular shapes in various sizes, adding a decorative touch to the center of the ad.

elements.label: Top left element
elements.description: A small rectangular element located at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Middle circular element
elements.description: A medium-sized circular element positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom left circular element
elements.description: A small circular element located towards the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom right circular element
elements.description: A small circular element located towards the bottom right of the ad.

elements.label: Left side circular element
elements.description: A small circular element positioned on the left side of the ad.

elements.label: Middle rectangular element
elements.description: A rectangular element located in the center of the ad, possibly decorative.

elements.label: NomadLaye text
elements.description: The same bold text 'NomadLaye' displayed prominently at the top.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Text at the bottom of the ad that communicates the offer: 'Escape this weekend Hotels flights in one tap'.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: Text at the very bottom that reads 'Try for free', encouraging user action.
